name: Paras Lohani
story: Every empire begins with a belief. For Paras Lohani, that belief took root in a college library, reading about Lakshmi Mittal’s improbable climb. “Events shouldn’t just be seen,” Paras thought. “They should change the game.” So, armed with software and business development scars, he emptied his modest savings in 2012 and gave birth to B2B Sales Arrow. There were no handout; just small clients who took a chance, and a founder who refused to quit. What followed was a slow, beautiful grind: from a one-person dream to a global experiential marketing powerhouse trusted by enterprises worldwide. Through every up and down, Paras has held one line sacred: “Actions speak louder than words.” It’s not just a motto. It’s the engine behind every innovation, every relationship, every real result.
